overall_summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is focusing on transitioning from a framework to a SaaS deployment platform (elizacloud) while integrating advanced autonomous trading and on-chain provenance features. High-velocity community development is centered on plugin registry submissions and clarifying the project's complex organizational boundaries.
key_facts: Moderator Odilitime clarified Hyperscape is an incubated project or independent project by Shaw, not an official Eliza Labs product, on March 27.
The xProof.app plugin was announced, providing on-chain decision provenance for agents on the MultiversX blockchain.
ElizaOS operates on a model separating the open-source framework from a commercial SaaS platform called elizacloud for agent deployment.
A developer submitted a trading flow plugin designed for plug-and-play integration between Eliza agents and trading infrastructure on March 27.
The official ecosystem tokens are restricted to ElizaOS (Jeju) and DegenAI, both supported by the labs.
Developer 'sailorpepe.eth' showcased an NFT-based system for 4,444 agents using a 3-tier MemGPT-style memory architecture and live market data feeds.
Infrastructure consolidation is underway to collapse production and development environments into a single Spartan instance for customer data management.
BitDelta exchange completed due diligence for AI16Z and is seeking marketing leads for a listing rollout plan.
open_questions: Is there a team member I can discuss a potential partnership with?
Anyone here built any ai agents that are trading autonomously?
What is the relationship between base milady and sol milady.ai? Does the milady app support both of them?

twitter_news_highlights.claim: Live Babylon Demo Day broadcast was streamed on X (formerly Twitter) on March 27.

new_issues_prs.title: xProof plugin in ElizaOS plugin registry
new_issues_prs.author: jasonxkensei
new_issues_prs.significance: Adds on-chain decision tracking and immutable timestamps via MultiversX.

new_issues_prs.title: Major database refactor
new_issues_prs.author: unknown
new_issues_prs.significance: Aims to improve long-term system architecture and performance for the beta launch.

overall_focus.claim: Development is currently focused on clearing functional blockers for a major beta release, including WhatsApp/Gmail integrations and a database overhaul.

discord_updates.summary: Focus on the elizacloud business model, the identity of ecosystem tokens, and resolving community confusion regarding Hyperscape's status as an incubated project.
Professional networking and introductions; 'trace' shared deep expertise in RAG, LLM orchestration, and multi-step agent workflows seeking startup opportunities.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users expressed confusion over the utility of ElizaOS token and the status of projects like Hyperscape, requiring moderator intervention.
Inquiries regarding the difficulty of the AI16Z migration process for those who missed the window were addressed with limited recourse.

strategic_insights.insight: The project is shifting its primary commercial value from the framework itself to elizacloud, positioning the framework as an open-source lead-generator for a hosted deployment service.
implications_or_questions: How will the community prioritize framework updates vs SaaS-only features?

strategic_insights.insight: The introduction of xProof and SAID Protocol suggests a strategic push toward verifiable agent actions, likely to increase trust in autonomous trading setups.
implications_or_questions: Will on-chain decision logging become a requirement for official registry plugins?

market_analysis.observation: BitDelta exchange confirms intentions to list AI16Z following due diligence.
market_analysis.relevance: Increases liquidity and visibility for the core ecosystem token.

market_analysis.observation: Emergence of specialized hosting providers like hatcher.host targeting the ElizaOS niche.
market_analysis.relevance: Indicates a growing secondary market for agent infrastructure.
